landmarks.name: Gwalior Fort
landmarks.intro: Massive hilltop fort with palaces, temples & blue-tiled architecture from 8th century.

landmarks.name: Teli ka Mandir
landmarks.intro: Tallest temple in Gwalior Fort, unique 'oil press' shape, 9th century architecture.

landmarks.name: Saas Bahu Temple
landmarks.intro: Twin temples dedicated to mother-in-law & daughter-in-law, intricate carvings (11th century).

landmarks.name: Man Mandir Palace
landmarks.intro: Raja Man Singh's palace inside Gwalior Fort, stunning Hindu architecture (15th century).

landmarks.name: Gujari Mahal
landmarks.intro: Raja Man Singh built for Gujar queen, now Archaeological Museum (15th century).

landmarks.name: Jai Vilas Palace
landmarks.intro: Scindia family's opulent palace with world's largest chandelier (1874).

landmarks.name: Gopachal Jain Monuments
landmarks.intro: 20 massive Jain tirthankara statues carved into rock (15th century).

landmarks.name: Chaturbhuj Temple
landmarks.intro: Towering Vishnu temple inside Gwalior Fort (9th century).

landmarks.name: Suraj Kund
landmarks.intro: Ancient stepped pond where Gwalior Fort legend began.

landmarks.name: Scindia School
landmarks.intro: Prestigious boarding school founded by Scindia royals (1897).

landmarks.name: Gwalior Zoo
landmarks.intro: Phool Bagh Zoo with tigers, leopards & birds.

landmarks.name: Sun Temple Gwalior
landmarks.intro: Rare 9th century Surya temple with excellent preservation.

landmarks.name: Bateshwar Temples
landmarks.intro: 200 ancient temples restored by INTACH (near Gwalior).

landmarks.name: Tigra Dam
landmarks.intro: Scenic reservoir 25km from Gwalior, boating & picnics.
